element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Single button, variable strength via hold duration

Third button input, close-range tactical option
Button combinations, varying by character archetype

element_introduction_order.element: Death Match arenas with environmental hazards
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Spiked walls, landmines, burning ropes, slick floors; optional competitive mode

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Match-based rhythm with escalating difficulty through tournament bracket progression; Death Match mode introduces environmental pressure spikes

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Death Match mode selection (player choice to engage hazard-filled arenas)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-level opponents; basic attack mastery with punch/kick/throw system
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Intermediate AI opponents; special move introduction and tactical layering
difficulty_curve.late_game: Advanced AI with special move chains; tournament finals require mastery of all mechanics
notable_spikes: Tournament finals opponents with aggressive special move patterns
Death Match mode with combined opponent AI and environmental hazards
World Heroes Perfect: ABC Special Move availability shifts tactical depth

notable_level_patterns.description: Linear single-elimination tournament structure; each opponent battle increases in AI difficulty; victory required to advance

Same opponents fought in hazard-filled environments with traps (spiked walls, landmines, burning ropes, slick floors) that damage or hinder both players; optional mode adding environmental challenge layer
Each fighter has unique special moves and ABC Special abilities (Perfect version); encourages replayability and character-specific tactical learning
